description: This is an HTML file that implements a web-based database viewer interface. It includes structure, styling, and client-side JavaScript code for fetching and displaying database, table, and data information.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches list of databases and populates the database sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the list of databases by reloading the data.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Toggles expansion for a selected database to show or hide its tables.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays list of tables for a given database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Loads and renders data for a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Renders data as a table with interactive cells for large or object data.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Renders individual cell data, handling nulls, objects, and long text.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content for long text or objects.
